eras.name: The Birth of the Transistor
eras.description: The invention of the transistor at Bell Labs marked the beginning of the semiconductor age. This revolutionary device would eventually replace vacuum tubes and enable the miniaturization of electronic devices.

companies.name: Bell Labs
companies.contribution: Invented the first transistor and pioneered semiconductor research

companies.name: Shockley Semiconductor
companies.contribution: Commercialized transistor technology and sparked Silicon Valley

eras.impact: The transistor invention revolutionized electronics, laying the foundation for the digital age and modern computing. It enabled smaller, more reliable, and energy-efficient devices that transformed every aspect of technology.

eras.name: The Microprocessor Revolution
eras.description: Intel introduces the 4004, the world's first commercial microprocessor. This breakthrough marked the beginning of the modern computing era.

companies.name: Intel
companies.contribution: Developed and commercialized the first microprocessor

eras.impact: The microprocessor democratized computing, leading to the personal computer revolution and establishing the foundation for today's digital world.

eras.name: The AI and Quantum Era
eras.description: The convergence of AI acceleration, quantum computing, and advanced semiconductor manufacturing pushes the boundaries of what's possible in computing.

companies.name: NVIDIA
companies.contribution: Pioneered AI accelerators and GPU computing

eras.impact: AI chips and quantum processors are enabling breakthroughs in artificial intelligence, scientific research, and complex problem-solving that were previously impossible.
